title: camissonia wigginsii
intro: Camissonia wigginsii, also known as Wiggins' evening primrose, is a rare and endangered flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Camissonia wigginsii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
